milestoneTitle: M10.12 — Electric-neon color retune + tube-lit border treatment. Base hexes pumped to the vivid end of each family: Learn #5ea514 → #16d94a (electric neon green), Projects #0e7fc4 → #0cb8f7 (electric cyan), Tools #e8610d → #ff6a1a (saturated warm orange). Tint-targets bumped to saturated yellows (Learn pure yellow #ffdc00, Projects amber #ffbe0a still biased off pure to avoid blue→green interpolation, Tools warm yellow #ffc200). Static identity tokens (--color-learn/projects/tools-solid + surface/border/glow) refreshed to match. Every --accent-* consumer across the site picks up the new values automatically via the parallel-families pattern shipped in M10.11. Border treatment on activated dashboard CTAs + active nav chips + their hover states now carries a tube-lit-from-inside recipe: existing 1px solid edge carrying --accent-border, PLUS a blurred inset glow (10px blur for CTAs, 8px for chips) bleeding --accent-glow inward, PLUS the existing outer glow, PLUS the soft drop shadow. The inset blur is the new layer — before, the inner edge was just a crisp 1px ring; now the color visibly bleeds into the surface for the neon-gas-tube read referenced off a photo the user shared. Hover states pick up a lighter version of the same inset+outer glow stack. Bundles M10.11b — new /architecture-review skill at .claude/skills/architecture-review/. Runs a proposed architecture against a catalog of 16 pitfalls this codebase has paid for: WebKit nested-var freeze, TDZ on initial-render, transform-exclusivity, layout-triggering properties during animation, color-mix through green for blue+yellow, localStorage cache verification, native-confirm in iOS PWA, iframe-blocking third-party feeds, no-runtime-API-calls, unverified SDK snippets, videos-above-articles, cache-bust without version.json bump, unified-cascade over opt-in shared class, parallel-over-unified for per-section tokens, stacked-animation time slots, dark-mode reintroduction. Each entry carries symptom / cause / fix / reference / when-to-flag trigger. Skill emits blocking vs advisory flags, ends with green-light / proceed-with-changes / rethink verdict. Invoked BEFORE writing substantial code for a novel pattern. Catalog is extensible via future feedback_*.md entries. Complements /accent-retune (implementer) and /tdz-audit (narrow render-path check).
